title: House GOP set to hold Joe Biden's attorney general in contempt of Congress
shortDescription: House Republicans are preparing to hold Attorney General Merrick Garland in contempt of Congress in a dramatic escalation of the GOP's war with the Biden administration.

title: This constitutional provision could keep Trump out of jail if he wins
shortDescription: A section of the Constitution makes the federal government "the supreme Law of the Land." Trump could use it to halt state sentences or trials.

title: No, Trump didn't vow to 'save' Hunter Biden | Fact check

shortDescription: Two jurors gave interviews after they voted to convict Hunter Biden of firearms felonies during a trial in Wilmington Tuesday.

title: Trump volunteer force shares name with controversial group
shortDescription: If Trump wins in November, he'll become the 47th president but his campaign's latest initiative, dubbed "Force 47," shares name with foreign group.
